title: Memory
content:
Night-dreams trace on Memory's wall
    Shadows of the thoughts of day,
    And thy fortunes, as they fall,
    The bias of the will betray.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ralph Waldo Emerson, titled "Memory", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
